leagueBriefing: Midweek college baseball delivered a little bit of everything across the country — statement wins from national contenders, a notable in-state upset, and several offense-heavy shootouts. Louisiana produced the headline result by knocking off LSU 7–2 in Lafayette, capitalizing on Tiger errors and timely hitting. Florida State posted the most explosive performance of the day with a 22-run eruption against Mercer, while Clemson and Tennessee rolled to run-rule victories behind dominant offenses. California piled up an eye-popping 21 hits in a rout of Cal State Bakersfield, showcasing one of the deepest lineups of the slate. A few games turned chaotic late, including Georgia’s 11–10 escape against Western Carolina and Old Dominion’s 12–10 slugfest win over VCU. With conference play approaching, the midweek slate offered an early signal of which contenders are heating up — and which powerhouse programs may still be vulnerable.
